top3.sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Patient
ORDER BY Age ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Patient
ORDER BY Age ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT CAST((julianday(Admission) - julianday(Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age
FROM Patient
WHERE Admission IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY Age ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT strftime('%Y', Admission) - strftime('%Y', Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', Admission) < strftime('%m-%d', Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Patient
WHERE Admission IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY Age ASC
LIMIT 1;

FROM Patient
ORDER BY Age ASC
LIMIT 1;
